install.title: Install the FullParty bot
install.subtitle: Add the bot to the Discord server you use for this group.
install.description: After the bot is installed, generate a link token and use it in Discord so FullParty can match this group to the correct server.

status.title: Linked Server
status.subtitle: The Discord server currently connected to this group.
status.empty: No Discord server is linked to this group yet.

link.title: Link this group
link.subtitle: Use a short-lived token to confirm the server from Discord.
link.description: Generate a token here, then run the bot's link command in the Discord server you want connected to this group.
link.active_token_description: Generate a new token if you need to see it again. The current token expires {date}.
link.no_token_description: Generate a token when you are ready to link from Discord.

settings.title: Bot Settings
settings.subtitle: Choose where the bot should post and which roles it can use.
settings.name_sync_hint: Keep Discord display names aligned with linked character names.
settings.not_linked_description: Install the bot and link this group before changing bot settings.
settings.snapshot_unavailable_description: The linked bot did not return server channels or roles. You can try again after the bot is online.

stats.title: Server Coverage
stats.coverage_hint: Linked users are members who installed the FullParty Discord app, not people who only used Discord login.
stats.coverage_unavailable: Coverage data is unavailable until the bot has a cached member list.
